item.title: WATCH: King Charles, Trump share quips, tout US-UK relationship at state dinner
item.description: President Donald Trump and first lady Melania Trump welcomed King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the White House on Tuesday evening for a state dinn...

item.title: WATCH: Humanoid robots at center of US-China competition
item.description: ABC News' Sophie Flay takes a closer look at the future of humanoid robots, where the race is on to see who gets there first.

item.title: Another Russian oil facility burns after Zelenskyy touts Ukraine’s drone reach
item.description: Ukraine is claiming responsibility for a drone attack on a distant Russian oil facility

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump says 'no more Mr. Nice Guy' if Iran refuses nuclear deal
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
